_comment: EXAMPLE Apps-SDK / MCP connector manifest for the Company Dossier ChatGPT App. Placeholder values are marked REPLACE_ME or noted with _comment fields. The Apps SDK manifest schema is evolving — verify exact field names against https://developers.openai.com/apps-sdk before submitting. Do not ship this file unedited.
name: Company Dossier
description: Build a complete, sourced intelligence dossier on any company or domain from public data: overview, people, hiring, funding, locations, tech stack, news, relationships, and risk flags — every claim cited and confidence-tagged.

mcp_server._comment: Remote MCP server exposing the build_dossier tool. URL is a placeholder — replace with the deployed endpoint.

tools.name: build_dossier
tools.description: Build a nine-section, sourced public-data dossier on a company. Input a company name or domain; returns overview & identity, people & org chart, hiring radar, money trail, locations, tech fingerprint, news & timeline, relationship web, and risk flags — each claim attributed to a public source and tagged High/Medium/Low confidence.

target.description: Company name or domain, e.g. 'Acme Robotics' or 'acme.com'.

auth._comment: Company Dossier uses public data only and needs no per-user credentials, so the default is no-auth. To meter usage or add accounts, switch type to 'oauth' and fill the block below (verify exact field names against the Apps SDK docs).

oauth._comment: Only used when auth.type is 'oauth'. REPLACE_ME values.
